language_note: Pythia (Bera et al., MICRO'21) is a CPU C++ tabular-SARSA prefetcher. Earlier project notes describing it as a GPU/ML prefetcher were incorrect; corrected here.

algorithmic_scope.update_rule: tabular SARSA, Q(s,a) += alpha * (r + gamma * max_a' Q(s', a') - Q(s,a))

deviation_from_reference: Canonical 2-feature SARSA only (paper's baseline before extended features).
No eligibility-trace lambda — single-step SARSA only.
Action 'offset 0' (no-prefetch) is placed last so argmax-tie-breaking on zero-initialized Q rows does not collapse to 'do nothing' before any learning has happened.
results_section: Search aggregate.pythia and per-trace results with label='pythia' for Pythia's measured IPC / LLC MPKI / L2C MPKI on 401.bzip2-7B, 403.gcc-16B, 429.mcf-22B.
